title: 10x to 27x lower risk of exfoliation glaucoma
summary: 10x to 27x lower risk of exfoliation glaucoma
detail: Unless you are a black south African, this uncommon SNP drastically reduces your risk of exfoliation glaucoma (also known as exfoliation syndrome, or pseudoexfoliation syndrome PEX). That form of glaucoma causes up to 10% of the cases of blindness in many countries, including the US. This mutation may not protect you from other kinds of glaucoma though.
